title: Set Time
body:
Set Spawn but for world time. Allows for quick resetting for routes such as [INSANE new SSG meta (Potential Sub 1 Minute??????)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GTcMJwZGUOI) and [unsortiertes route](https://youtu.be/39odxjc1cmE?si=hL22UN3WuYk_jIBW)

#### Explanation for people unfamiliar (I'm required to put this here :P)
This mod was made as a joke for speedrunning because set seed runs are timed at first input, so there's a meme route where you enter beds during night-time, as seen in the video(s) above. The set-spawn mod allows you to get a specific spawn when loading up a world to simulate autoresetting for a specific spawn, and in a similar vein, this mod sets world time on load it to the exact time you can sleep to simulate waiting for 10 mins.
